testimonial.text: We chose Massar for our platform development and the transparent pricing was a breath of fresh air. They delivered exactly what was promised, on time and within budget. The ongoing support has been exceptional.
testimonial.author: Client Name

items.question: Why isn't every project priced the same?
items.answer: Every project is unique in scope, complexity, and requirements. A simple brochure website requires less time and resources than a custom web application with user accounts, API integrations, and an admin dashboard. Our pricing reflects the actual effort needed to deliver quality work.

items.question: What's included in the quoted price?
items.answer: Our quotes cover strategy, design, development, testing, and deployment. We are transparent about what's included and what's not, so there are no surprises. Each proposal includes a clear breakdown of deliverables, timeline, and payment schedule.

items.question: How are payments handled?
items.answer: We typically work with a milestone-based payment structure. A deposit is required to begin work, followed by payments at key project milestones. The final balance is due upon completion and approval. We are flexible on schedules and happy to discuss terms that work for both parties.

items.question: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
items.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing maintenance and support packages. These include security updates, performance monitoring, content updates, and technical support. Monthly retainer options start at 10,000 DZD/month and can be tailored to your needs.

items.question: Are revisions included?
items.answer: Yes, our packages include a set number of revision rounds during the design phase (typically 2–3 rounds). Additional revisions beyond the agreed scope are billed at our standard hourly rate. We make sure you're happy with the result before moving to development.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Timelines vary by project complexity. A standard website (2–3 weeks), a growth bundle (3–5 weeks), and custom applications (6–12 weeks). We provide a detailed timeline in every proposal and keep you updated throughout the process.

items.question: Can pricing change after the project starts?
items.answer: Once the scope is agreed upon and the contract is signed, the price remains fixed. If you request additional features or changes that were not in the original scope, we will discuss the impact on timeline and budget before proceeding.

items.question: Do you work with international clients?
items.answer: Absolutely. We work with clients worldwide and are comfortable collaborating remotely. We use modern communication tools (Slack, WhatsApp, Notion, Figma) and are used to working across different time zones.

journeya.title: Journeya Case Study | Tourism Platform & App | Massar Digital Studio
journeya.description: How Journeya launched a tourism booking platform, mobile app, and brand identity with Massar — custom web development in Algeria.

wafr.title: Wafr Case Study | Food Waste App | Massar Digital Studio
wafr.description: See how Massar built Wafr's food waste app in Algeria with geolocation, real-time alerts, and a successful beta launch in Algiers.

darlink.title: DarLink Case Study | Real Estate Platform | Massar Digital Studio
darlink.description: DarLink reached 200+ property listings with advanced search and messaging — a real estate platform built by Massar in Algeria.

nextgen.title: NextGen Case Study | E-Commerce Store | Massar Digital Studio
nextgen.description: NextGen hit 90+ Lighthouse scores with a custom e-commerce store by Massar — fast checkout, premium UX, and SEO-ready architecture.

journeya.challenge: Journeya needed a complete digital ecosystem combining a booking platform, mobile app, and cohesive brand identity to launch their tourism startup.
journeya.solution: We designed and developed a responsive web app with real-time booking, a companion mobile app, and a full brand identity system including logo, colors, and assets.
journeya.outcomes: Launched on schedule with a unified brand experience across web and mobile platforms.
journeya.summary: Journeya, a tourism startup based in Algeria, needed a complete digital ecosystem to launch their business — a responsive booking platform, a companion mobile application, and a cohesive brand identity — with all three deliverables requiring simultaneous launch within a tight timeframe. Massar designed and developed a feature-rich web application with real-time booking capabilities, a cross-platform mobile app for iOS and Android, and a full brand identity system including logo, color palette, typography, and brand asset guidelines. The technology stack combined React and Node.js for a performant web experience, Tailwind CSS for responsive, mobile-first styling, and Figma for collaborative prototyping and developer handoff. All three deliverables launched on schedule, providing Journeya with a seamless, unified brand experience across web and mobile platforms. Key outcomes include on-time simultaneous launch of all ecosystem components and cohesive brand consistency across every customer touchpoint. Massar continues to partner with Journeya on ongoing optimization and feature development.

wafr.challenge: Wafr required an intuitive mobile application to connect consumers with nearby food deals and reduce food waste.
wafr.solution: Built a cross-platform mobile application with geolocation, real-time notifications, and an easy onboarding flow.
wafr.outcomes: Successfully launched with beta users in Algiers, receiving positive early feedback on usability.
wafr.summary: Wafr set out to tackle the pressing issue of food waste in Algeria by connecting consumers with surplus food deals from local restaurants and shops. The startup needed an intuitive cross-platform mobile application that could scale quickly while delivering a frictionless user experience. Massar developed a cross-platform mobile application using React Native, enabling simultaneous launch on iOS and Android from a single codebase. The app integrates geolocation features powered by Google Maps API to help users discover nearby deals, real-time push notifications via Firebase for instant deal alerts, and a streamlined onboarding flow designed to maximize user adoption. Firebase provides the backend infrastructure for authentication, data storage, and cloud messaging. The result is a fully functional mobile application successfully launched with beta users in Algiers, receiving positive early feedback on usability, design, and overall user experience. The platform demonstrates strong product-market fit in the Algerian food sustainability space.

darlink.challenge: DarLink needed a modern real estate platform that connects buyers, sellers, and investors in the Algerian market.
darlink.solution: Developed a full-featured web platform with advanced property search, filters, and direct messaging between parties.
darlink.outcomes: Platform launched with 200+ property listings and positive traction from early adopters.
darlink.summary: DarLink recognized the need for a modern, trustworthy real estate platform tailored to the unique dynamics of the Algerian property market. Buyers, sellers, and investors lacked a centralized digital solution with reliable listings, advanced search capabilities, and direct communication tools. Massar developed a full-featured web platform using Next.js and TypeScript for a robust, type-safe frontend, with PostgreSQL powering a reliable database layer and Stripe integrated for payment processing. The platform includes advanced property search with comprehensive filters, direct messaging between buyers and sellers, detailed property listing pages, and investor-specific features. The platform launched successfully with over 200 property listings from early adopter agents and property owners, generating positive traction and engagement from the real estate community in Algeria. DarLink now serves as a central hub connecting property seekers with sellers and investors, addressing a critical gap in the Algerian proptech landscape.

nextgen.challenge: NextGen wanted an e-commerce store that reflected their premium product quality and provided a seamless shopping experience.
nextgen.solution: Created a custom e-commerce solution with optimized product pages, fast checkout flow, and performance-first architecture.
nextgen.outcomes: Achieved 90+ Lighthouse performance score and delivered a brand-aligned shopping experience.
nextgen.summary: NextGen, a premium product brand, needed an e-commerce store that would reflect the exceptional quality of their products while delivering a seamless, conversion-optimized shopping experience. Their existing online presence did not match the premium nature of their brand, resulting in suboptimal conversion rates. Massar built a custom e-commerce solution using Next.js for server-side rendering and optimal performance, integrated with Shopify’s commerce backend for reliable order management. Tailwind CSS enabled a custom, brand-aligned design system, and the site was deployed on Vercel for global edge delivery and instant scalability. The result is a premium e-commerce experience that achieved a 90+ performance score on Google Lighthouse, reflecting the performance-first architecture. The checkout flow was optimized for maximum conversion without compromising trust signals, and the design language consistently reflects the brand’s premium positioning across every product page, cart interaction, and customer touchpoint.

seo.title: About Massar | Digital Agency & Web Development Algeria
seo.description: Meet Massar Digital Studio — an Algerian digital agency specializing in custom website development, SEO services, mobile apps, and brand identity.

hero.title: A digital studio
hero.subtitle: We're a small, specialized team based in Algeria, building digital experiences that help businesses grow. From strategy and design to development and launch — we treat every project as a partnership.
hero.subtitleMicro: Strategy-first development • Transparent process • 24-hour response time

story.title: Our story
story.intro: Massar Digital Studio was founded with a simple belief: great digital experiences should be built with strategy, care, and transparency — not shortcuts.
paragraphs: We started as a small team of designers and developers who were frustrated by how many agencies delivered beautiful websites that didn't actually help businesses grow. Too often, design was treated as decoration rather than a business tool. We knew there was a better way.

Today, we work with startups, growing businesses, and established companies across Algeria and beyond. Every project — whether it's a website, a mobile app, a brand identity, or an AI solution — follows the same philosophy: understand the goal first, design with purpose, and build for performance.
We're proud of the work we've done and the relationships we've built. But we're just getting started.

mission.subtitle: These principles guide every decision we make and every project we deliver.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: To help businesses grow by building digital experiences that are strategically sound, beautifully designed, and technically excellent.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted digital partner for businesses in Algeria and beyond — known for craft, transparency, and real results.

items.title: Craft in every detail
items.description: Every pixel, every interaction, every line of code is intentional. We don't cut corners because your reputation is our reputation.

items.title: Strategy before execution
items.description: We never start with design or code. We start by understanding your goals, your audience, and your market — because the right strategy makes everything else easier.

items.title: Radical transparency
items.description: No jargon, no hidden fees, no surprises. We communicate clearly, share progress regularly, and treat your budget like our own.

items.title: Performance is non-negotiable
items.description: A beautiful site that loads slowly is a bad investment. We build for speed, accessibility, and SEO from the first line of code.

items.title: Long-term thinking
items.description: We build partnerships, not just projects. The best work happens when we understand your business deeply — and that takes time and trust.

why.title: Why clients choose us
why.subtitle: We don't claim to be the biggest agency. But we work hard to be the most trusted one.

items.title: Strategy-first approach
items.description: We don't open Figma or start coding until we understand your business goals, target audience, and competitive landscape. Every design decision is backed by research.

items.title: Modern technical expertise
items.description: We build with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS — modern technologies that deliver fast, maintainable, and scalable results. No outdated frameworks, no bloated page builders.

items.title: Performance obsession
items.description: We target 90+ Lighthouse scores on every project. Fast load times improve user experience, SEO rankings, and conversion rates — that's not optional, it's essential.

items.title: Clear, honest communication
items.description: You'll never wonder what's happening with your project. We provide regular updates via Slack or WhatsApp, respond within hours, and are always available for a quick call.

items.title: Accessibility by default
items.description: We build to WCAG 2.2 AA standards because inclusive design is good design. Every project considers keyboard navigation, screen readers, color contrast, and reduced motion.

items.title: Post-launch partnership
items.description: We don't disappear after launch. We offer ongoing support, maintenance, and optimization to ensure your digital presence continues to perform and grow.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.ctaMicro: We're happy to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

items.question: How much does a professional website cost?
items.answer: Our pricing is project-based and depends on scope, complexity, and features. A standard business website starts from 35,000 DZD, while more complex projects with custom functionality, e-commerce, or integrations are quoted individually. We provide a detailed breakdown in every proposal so you know exactly what you're paying for — no hidden fees, no surprises.

items.question: Do you offer SEO services, and how are they priced?
items.answer: Yes, SEO is built into every website we build — from technical fundamentals like meta tags, sitemaps, and structured data to performance optimization that boosts rankings. For ongoing SEO strategy, content optimization, and link building, we offer monthly retainer packages starting from 25,000 DZD/month. Every SEO engagement starts with a free audit of your current online presence.

items.question: What are your payment terms?
items.answer: We work on a milestone-based payment structure. A 40% deposit is required to begin work, with subsequent payments tied to key deliverables: design approval, development completion, and final launch. This ensures you always know where your investment is going and never pay for work that hasn't been delivered. We're flexible on schedules and happy to discuss terms that work for your cash flow.

items.question: How long does a typical project take from start to finish?
items.answer: Timelines depend on project complexity. A standard brochure or business website takes 2–3 weeks from kickoff to launch. More advanced projects with custom development, user accounts, or e-commerce typically take 3–5 weeks. Large-scale platforms or web applications can range from 6–12 weeks. Every proposal includes a detailed timeline with milestones so you know exactly what to expect and when.

items.question: What does your delivery process look like?
items.answer: We follow a structured six-phase process: Discovery, Planning, Design, Development, Launch, and Support. We start by understanding your business, audience, and goals in depth. After a strategy session, we design mockups for your approval, then build the site in stages with regular check-ins. Before launch, we run thorough testing for performance, accessibility, SEO, and cross-device compatibility.

items.question: How many revisions are included in the design phase?
items.answer: Every package includes 2–3 rounds of revisions during the design phase, depending on the plan you choose. This gives us room to refine the look and feel until it aligns with your vision. If additional revisions are needed beyond the agreed scope, we accommodate them at our standard hourly rate. Our goal is your full satisfaction before we move into development.

items.question: What technology stack do you use to build websites?
items.answer: We build on modern, battle-tested technologies: React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS for fast, maintainable frontends. For backends, we use Node.js, Firebase, or Supabase depending on project requirements. This stack delivers excellent performance (90+ Lighthouse scores), strong SEO foundations, and easy scalability as your business grows. We avoid outdated page builders and bloated CMS platforms.

items.question: Will I be able to manage content on my own after the site is launched?
items.answer: Absolutely. If your project includes a CMS, we set up an intuitive dashboard that lets you update text, images, blog posts, and other content without touching any code. For simpler sites without a CMS, we provide a handoff guide and are always available for quick content updates. We'll train you or your team on how to manage everything after launch.

items.question: Do you provide hosting, maintenance, and ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes. We offer hosting setup and ongoing maintenance packages that include security monitoring, performance optimization, regular backups, plugin/ dependency updates, and priority technical support. Monthly maintenance starts at 10,000 DZD/month. We also provide emergency support for critical issues. Post-launch support is not an afterthought — it's a core part of how we build long-term partnerships.

items.question: Why should I choose Massar over other digital agencies in Algeria?
items.answer: We combine global technical standards with deep understanding of the Algerian market. Every project is built with strategy first — we don't design or code until we understand your business goals, audience, and competitive landscape. We use modern technologies (React, Next.js, TypeScript), target 90+ Lighthouse scores, and follow WCAG accessibility standards. Our processes are transparent, our communication is responsive, and we treat every budget with respect.

items.question: Do you have experience working with businesses in Algeria?
items.answer: Yes — Algeria is our home market, and we've built digital products for Algerian startups (Journeya, Wafr) and established businesses (DarLink) across travel, real estate, e-commerce, and sustainability sectors. We understand the local digital landscape, consumer behavior, and business challenges. We're based in Algeria, responsive in your time zone, and can communicate in Arabic, French, or English.

items.question: What guarantees do you offer, and what happens if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: We stand behind our work with a transparent revision policy during the design phase and a post-launch support period to address any issues. Our milestone-based payment structure means you only pay for completed, approved work. If at any point you feel the project isn't meeting expectations, we'll discuss adjustments openly. We've built our reputation on trust, and we treat every project as a long-term partnership.
